headlines.title: SoftBank Group shares soar over 16% as Nvidia earnings signal strong AI momentum
headlines.summary: SoftBank Group is closely tied to the AI boom through its stake in Arm Holdings, whose chip designs are used in AI servers and data centers powered by Nvidia systems.

headlines.title: Bezos defends billionaires, hypes AI, talks taxes and praises Trump in CNBC interview
headlines.summary: Jeff Bezos rejected accusations that Amazon's decision to release a documentary on first lady Melania Trump was an effort to curry favor with the president.

headlines.title: Japan exports jump 14.8% in April, beating expectations as semiconductor shipments soar
headlines.summary: The figure outperformed the 9.3% estimate from Reuters.

headlines.title: Congress is best chance to stop Trump 'lawfare' fund, attorneys say
headlines.summary: The Department of Justice has set up a $1.8 billion fund that will purportedly compensate victims of prosecutorial overreach under the Biden administration.

headlines.title: Inside India newsletter: India’s investment appeal dims as firms and funds pivot to the U.S.
headlines.summary: AI-driven growth and 'America-first' policies are pulling global capital to the U.S., challenging India's appeal as the fastest-growing economy.

headlines.title: U.S. crude oil falls below $100 per barrel after Trump says Iran talks in final stages
headlines.summary: Trump told reporters that the administration was in the "final stages" of negotiations with Iran, according to a pool report.

headlines.title: Crypto companies are trying to leave the hype cycle for a more disciplined phase, earnings show
headlines.summary: Crypto companies spent years monetizing volatility. Now they're trying to survive without it.

headlines.title: Something very unusual is happening with Nvidia options
headlines.summary: Ahead of earnings, NVDA's short-dated calls are trading at a premium to puts.

headlines.title: Here's how Nvidia has traded each of the last 16 quarters
headlines.summary: Options pricing has overestimated the size of Nvidia's post-report swing six of the past seven quarters, and 14 of the past 20, according to Cboe LiveVol data.

headlines.title: Software stocks stage 'mini' bull market. Some traders see more gains
headlines.summary: As semiconductor shares dragged down the Nasdaq-100 for a second day, quietly, software stocks appear to have found their groove.

headlines.title: Nvidia bulls mount uphill battle into earnings
headlines.summary: Call volume outpaced puts by more than double on Monday, though more calls were exchanged at the bid or below, meaning likely sold.

headlines.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
headlines.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."

headlines.title: Vox’s sale marks the end of an era for a once-booming form of digital media. Here’s how it all came undone.
headlines.summary: Companies like BuzzFeed, Vice and Vox were once worth billions, but shifting audiences and declines in advertising have sent their values plummeting.

headlines.title: Gen Z may be shying away from buying cosmetics, as higher gas prices hit spending
headlines.summary: E.l.f. Beauty says it will cut prices on some products, following tariff-related increases last year and concerns about the rising cost of gas.

headlines.title: Investors are flocking to an offshore crypto platform for an early shot at trading the SpaceX IPO
headlines.summary: A fast-growing offshore market is giving investors around the world an opportunity to trade what is expected to be the biggest IPO in history before it even happens — all while completely bypassing Wall Street.

headlines.title: I inherited a house. My CPA says I should sell within a year to avoid capital gains. Is he right?
headlines.summary: “We plan to sell it to another family member for the appraised value.”

headlines.title: I’m selling my $1 million home. Will my agent really charge less than a 6% commission?
headlines.summary: “I haven’t bought or sold property since the National Association of Realtors ruling that decoupled buyer’s and seller’s agent commissions.”
